column1: Aaron Judge leads the charge for Beat The Streak players today, boasting a rock-solid 67.6% hit probability and a steady bat locked into the two-hole on the road. Judge’s reliable profile and top-of-order role make him a go-to pick, even with Logan Webb on the hill. Cody Bellinger isn’t far behind, offering a strong 66.9% chance to record a hit and the added bonus of a platoon advantage, making him a sharp play in the heart of the lineup. Luis Arraez brings his trademark contact skills atop the order, while Trent Grisham and Heliot Ramos round out the list with favorable spots and sneaky upside. Stick with Judge for the safest floor, but Bellinger’s matchup is too good to ignore.
